src/reporting/cross_asset_report.py.notes: Cross-asset report payload is exercised by the report/signal runtime path in ARCH106.

src/reporting/decision_report.py.notes: Decision report is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.

src/reporting/market_regime.py.notes: Market regime summary is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.

src/reporting/report_formatter.py.notes: Report formatter receives and renders the market report payload on the ARCH106 runtime path.

src/reporting/screener_engine.py.notes: Screener snapshot is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.

src/signals/entry_quality.py.notes: Entry trigger quality is executed by build_signals on the ARCH106 BUY_WATCH signal runtime path.

src/signals/exit_target_quality.py.notes: Exit target quality is executed by build_signals on the ARCH106 BUY_WATCH signal runtime path.

src/signals/scanner_metrics_pipeline.py.notes: DATA1 diagnostics are normalized and passed into signal generation on the report path.

src/signals/signal_generator.py.notes: Report/signal runtime path is CI-proven in ARCH106 Step 1.

src/signals/signal_identity.py.notes: Deterministic signal identity generation is executed by build_signals on the ARCH106 BUY_WATCH signal runtime path.

src/signals/stop_loss_quality.py.notes: Stop-loss quality is executed by build_signals on the ARCH106 BUY_WATCH signal runtime path.

src/signals/trade_plan_validator.py.notes: Trade-plan validation is executed by build_signals as the final executable signal gate on the ARCH106 BUY_WATCH runtime path.

policy: New production modules under src/ must be explicitly classified before merge. Existing legacy modules are grandfathered until the full ARCH106 inventory pass is completed. The unclassified legacy baseline must not grow.
